zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Francis Backler於1617年6月24日之前出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Richard Backler34歲，母親Anna 'Hanna' Sherman28歲。她於1635年與John Cross在美國緬因州約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1662年在美國緬因州約克威爾斯，埋葬在美國緬因州約克威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Francis Backler于1617年6月24日之前出生在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆时，她的父亲Richard Backler34岁，母亲Anna 'Hanna' Sherman28岁。她于1635年与John Cross在美国缅因州約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1662年在美国缅因州約克威爾斯，埋葬在美国缅因州約克威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Backler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: occupational name, status name from Norman French bacaler ‘a young knight, a novice in arms’. The [k] is a characteristically Norman form where Central French has [tʃ]; see Batchelor .

variants.name: Backner
meanings: 1 English: occupational name from Middle English * baconer, * baconour ‘curer of bacon, bacon-seller’.
2  English: perhaps also a variant of   Backler  .

variants.name: Batchelor
meanings: English: status name for a young knight or novice at arms, Middle English and Old French bacheler (medieval Latin baccalarius). The word had already been extended to mean ‘(young) unmarried man’ by the 14th century, but it is unlikely that many bearers of the surname derive from the word in that sense.

History: The Reverend Stephen Bachiler (c. 1561–1656) was a Puritan nonconformist, born in Hampshire, England, who came to New England in 1632, at the age of 71. In 1638/9 he was the leader of the founders of Hampton, NH.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Francis Backler was born before 24 June 1617, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Backler, was 34 and her mother, Anna 'Hanna' Sherman, was 28. She married John Cross in 1635, in Wells, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1662, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, and was buried in Wells, York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Francis Backler est née avant 24 juin 1617, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Backler, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Anna 'Hanna' Sherman, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Cross en 1635, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1662, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis, et a été enterrée à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis.

Sie hat 1635 in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten John Cross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1662 in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Francis Backlerが1617年6月24日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父Richard Backlerは34歳，母Anna 'Hanna' Shermanは28歳であった。1635年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズでJohn Crossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1662年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Francis Backler(이)가 1617년 6월 24일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Backler(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna 'Hanna' Sherman(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1635년 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 John Cross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1662년 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Francis Backler родилась перед 24 июнь 1617 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Backler было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Anna 'Hanna' Sherman, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cross в 1635 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1662 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты и была похоронена в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.
